required_action_contract: no independent additive s * tbar t top source
required_authority: strict non-observed g2 or sqrt(g2^2+gY^2) certificate
sector-overlap identity or radial-spurion action contract satisfaction
retained-route/assembly gates rerun before proposal wording
required_rows: production dM_W/ds or dM_Z/ds row with uncertainty
matched top/W or top/Z covariance from the same ensemble/source shifts
nonzero W/Z slope with fit-window and bootstrap/jackknife metadata
acceptance_schema.required_source: one same scalar source s for top, W, and Z responses

actual_current_surface_status: exact-support / WZ response-ratio identifiability contract; current response rows, matched covariance, strict g2, and accepted same-source action are absent

parent_statuses.campaign_status: open / active campaign continuing after current shortcut blocks
parent_statuses.electroweak_g2_builder: open / electroweak g2 certificate builder inputs absent
parent_statuses.radial_spurion_action_contract: exact-support / no-independent-top-source radial-spurion action contract; current additive-source action not adopted
parent_statuses.retained_route: open / retained closure not yet reached
parent_statuses.same_source_ew_action_gate: exact negative boundary / same-source EW action not defined on PR230 surface
parent_statuses.same_source_top_response_builder: open / same-source top-response identity or covariance inputs absent
parent_statuses.top_wz_covariance_import_audit: exact negative boundary / no importable same-surface top-W covariance theorem on current PR230 surface
parent_statuses.top_wz_matched_covariance_builder: open / matched top-W response rows absent
parent_statuses.wz_g2_authority_firewall: exact negative boundary / WZ response g2 authority absent for PR230
parent_statuses.wz_mass_fit_response_row_builder: open / WZ mass-fit response-row builder inputs absent
parent_statuses.wz_response_route_completion: exact negative boundary / WZ same-source response route not complete on current PR230 surface

proposal_allowed_reason: The algebraic response-ratio contract is exact support only.  The current surface lacks the required production top/W/Z rows, matched covariance certificate, strict non-observed g2 certificate, and accepted same-source radial-spurion action.
strict_non_claims: does not claim retained or proposed_retained y_t closure
does not treat the current additive FH/LSZ top mass source as a radial spurion
does not use W/Z smoke rows as production mass-response rows
does not infer covariance from marginal top and W/Z rows
does not use observed g2, observed W/Z masses, or observed y_t
does not set kappa_s, c2, Z_match, g2, or delta_perp to one or zero by fiat
